name: “THE DIGITAL ADVENTURE OF A LIFETIME”
description:
- This bot is the reworked, and English translated version of @Faeskunk’s bot -

The world and digital world are in trouble. New threats have emerged from the corrupted data of old villainous Digimon, and now fractal codes are discarded and shattering across both realities. Creating portals that allow Digimon to slip through into the real world and cause destruction

You, are one of the new Digidestined, along with 3 others, must team up and work together to bring balance to both worlds and save the world and digital worlds!

{ to clarify, most of the tokens and information is based heavily off of Tamers. But there are some things that will be different, such as the Digimon you may meet }
creator: JacoTheWacko
